metadata.status_reason: Articles are not openly published on the journal's WordPress site. The /publications/ajil/ page contains only submission policy and call-for-papers PDFs. Full text is distributed through Westlaw and AustLII (http://www.austlii.edu.au/au/journals/AUIntLawJl/), but AustLII is behind a Cloudflare WAF challenge.

navigation.archive_path: no archive — only policy PDFs on the journal page
navigation.notes: Probed 2026-05-08. Searched WP REST (/wp-json/wp/v2/posts and /pages) — only 4 'call for papers' announcement posts exist, no article posts. /publications/ajil/archive/ returns 404. AustLII has full text but is WAF-blocked without browser. Revisit only if open access changes or AustLII becomes accessible.
